# AiShort

> Curated AI prompt templates for writing, coding, and translation. One-click copy to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or DeepSeek for precise, ready-to-use output.

## Documentation

- [Curated AI Prompt Library | Copy & Boost Productivity](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/): AI Short is a curated library of AI prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other major models. Built for professionals and students — copy prompts instantly, translate across 18 languages, organize your personal collection, and share with the community.
- [Deploy AI Short | Vercel, Docker & Cloudflare Setup](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/deploy): Want to host your own AI prompt library? Deploy AI Short easily using Vercel, Docker, or Cloudflare. Includes config tips and auto-update scripts.
- [AI Short Configuration and Customization | Edit Titles, Prompts, Custom Backend](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/deploy/configuration): Customize AI Short — change the site title and description, add homepage prompts, and connect a custom backend, including the API module structure and caching mechanism.
- [AI Short Offline Deployment | Self-Hosted for Corporate Intranets](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/deploy/offline): The AI Short offline edition is built for enterprises and teams that can't reach the public internet. No backend server, no account required, data stays in the browser — deploy once and your team is ready to go.
- [AI Short Standard Deployment | Local Build, Vercel, Cloudflare, Docker](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/deploy/standard): AI Short standard deployment guide — reuse the official shared backend with local build, one-click Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, and Docker, working out of the box.
- [AI Short Sync Updates | Keep Your Fork Following Upstream](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/deploy/sync-updates): Keep your AI Short fork automatically following upstream updates — fix the "update available" prompt on Vercel deployments and enable automatic GitHub Actions syncing.
- [AI Short Extension | ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude Sidebar · Chrome/Edge/Firefox](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension): AiShort prompts inside the sidebar of ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Doubao — no tab-switching or copy-pasting. One-click install for Chrome, Edge, Firefox.
- [Firefox Extension Setup - Pinning & Permissions Guide](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/firefox-extension-setting): Firefox extension setup guide - Pin the extension to the toolbar and authorize it to run on websites like ChatGPT and Gemini so the sidebar displays correctly.
- [Chrome CRX Install - Manual Developer Mode Setup](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/manual-chrome-extension): Manually install the AI Short extension via a CRX file. Enable developer mode and drag to install. Includes solutions for common issues.
- [Chrome ZIP Install - Manual AI Short Extension Setup](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/manual-chrome-extension-zip): Install the AI Short extension in Chrome via a ZIP file. Unzip and drag into the extensions page. Suitable when CRX cannot be installed.
- [AI Short Extension Guide - Sidebar & Shortcuts Mastered](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/usage): Master the AI Short browser extension! Enable the sidebar and invoke the prompt library with the Alt+Shift+S shortcut.
- [AI Short Account | Google & Passwordless Login Guide](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/account): Sign in with Google or passwordless email links to access your personal collection on AiShort. Reset your password in one click and recover your account data easily.
- [AI Short Community | Discover & Share Quality AI Prompts](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/community): Discover top-rated AI prompts in the community! Voting helps quality content surface — share your best ideas for exposure, or set yours to private.
- [AI Short FAQ | Use, Optimize, Commercial Use & Privacy](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/faq): Is AiShort free? Are prompts cross-model compatible? Can I use them commercially? This guide answers 13 common questions covering use, optimization, commercial use, and data privacy.
- [AI Short Quick Start | Copy Prompts to ChatGPT/DeepSeek](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/getting-started): Start boosting AI productivity in 30 seconds! Copy curated prompts to ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek and other AI models to instantly improve conversation quality.
- [AI Short Interface Guide | Tag Filtering & Smart Search](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/interface): Master the AI Short interface! Quickly locate prompts via tag filtering and keyword search, understand card details and collection operations.
- [My Collection | Organize AI Prompts with Tags & Sorting](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/my-collection): Collect your favorite AI prompts and organize them with custom tags. Drag-and-drop sorting builds a personalized prompt library.
- [AI Short Custom Prompts | Create, Edit & Share](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/user-prompts): Create your own AI prompts and save them to your account for instant access. Share to the community or keep private, and export backups in one click.
- [AiShort Privacy Policy](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/privacy-policy): AiShort Privacy Policy Last updated May 25, 2023 This privacy notice for aishort.top ("we," "us," or "our") describes how and why we might collect, store, use,...
- [Terms of Service](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/terms-of-service): Terms of Service Last updated May 25, 2023 1. Introduction These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the website, products, and services (collectively,...
